plan.title: Flip the 5 Bucket-A entrypoints to their existing TS verbs

narratives.Description: Five live task entrypoints already have a registered TS dispatcher verb but their Taskfile lines still shell `uv run python scripts/*.py`. This story repoints those lines to `node {{.DEFT_ROOT}}/packages/cli/dist/bin.js <verb>` so they execute TS, with no new TS code required. It is independently buildable because each owned Taskfile is touched by no other Wave 8.6 story, and the verbs (session:start, issue-emit, pr-closing-keywords, swarm-readiness, toolchain:check) are already exposed and parity-proven.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. In tasks/session.yml (session_start.py -> session:start), tasks/issue.yml (issue_emit.py -> issue-emit), tasks/pr.yml (pr_check_closing_keywords.py -> pr-closing-keywords), tasks/swarm.yml (swarm_readiness.py -> swarm-readiness), and tasks/toolchain.yml (toolchain-check.py -> toolchain:check), replace each `uv --project ... run python .../scripts/<name>.py <args>` cmd with `node {{.DEFT_ROOT}}/packages/cli/dist/bin.js <verb> <args>`, preserving CLI_ARGS/USER_WORKING_DIR templating and deps. 2. Verify each flip by running `task session:start` and `task swarm:readiness -- --help` against packages/cli/dist/bin.js output and confirming `task ts:parity-all` stays CLEAN. 3. Add a CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry referencing #1854.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft maintainer, I want the already-ported session/issue/pr/swarm/toolchain task entrypoints to run on the TS dispatcher, so that the Python copies become unreferenced and deletable in #1731.

items.title: Given `task session:start`, when it runs, then it invokes `node .../dist/bin.js session:start` (no `uv run python session_start.py`) and records the ritual state identically.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task session:start`, when it runs, then it invokes `node .../dist/bin.js session:start` (no `uv run python session_start.py`) and records the ritual state identically.

items.title: Given `task issue:emit`, `task pr:check-closing-keywords`, `task swarm:readiness`, and `task toolchain:check`, when each runs, then it invokes the corresponding bin.js verb and produces output matching the prior Python behavior.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `task issue:emit`, `task pr:check-closing-keywords`, `task swarm:readiness`, and `task toolchain:check`, when each runs, then it invokes the corresponding bin.js verb and produces output matching the prior Python behavior.

items.title: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python .*scripts/(session_start|issue_emit|pr_check_closing_keywords|swarm_readiness|toolchain-check)\.py' tasks/`, when run, then it returns no matches.

narrative.Acceptance: Given `grep -rE 'uv .*run python .*scripts/(session_start|issue_emit|pr_check_closing_keywords|swarm_readiness|toolchain-check)\.py' tasks/`, when run, then it returns no matches.

expected_outputs: Flipped task entrypoints invoking bin.js verbs

references.title: Issue #1854: feat(ts-migration): Wave 8.6 -- finish the partial Python->TS live flip (precondition for #1731 delete)
